_comment: An entry INGESTED from an MCP server (transport:'mcp'). Demonstrates VERBATIM schema passthrough: `io.input` is byte-for-byte the MCP tool's inputSchema, and `mcp.raw` carries the complete original MCP Tool object unmodified. Plexus only WRAPS — it never rewrites an ingested schema. `describe` is seeded from the tool's description and MAY be enriched by an attached usage skill (the additive layer). This same shape is what a user extension would also produce — fully isomorphic with the obsidian and orchestrator entries.
label: Create a GitHub issue
describe: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository. (Seeded verbatim from the MCP tool description; Plexus may attach a usage skill above this.) Requires write access. Use when the user asks to file, open, or create an issue. MCP-native — passed through from the github MCP server.

raw.name: create_issue
raw.title: Create Issue
raw.description: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository.
